cli_commands.name: chump
cli_commands.flags_summary: chump <command> [options]

cli_commands.name: gap
cli_commands.flags_summary: gap <sub>  (alias: g)  list, show, reserve, ship, audit-priorities …

cli_commands.name: claim
cli_commands.flags_summary: claim <GAP-ID>  (alias: c)  atomic worktree + lease + preflight in one call

cli_commands.name: ship
cli_commands.flags_summary: ship <GAP-ID>   (alias: s)  shorthand for 'gap ship <GAP-ID>'

cli_commands.name: gen
cli_commands.flags_summary: gen <task>         AI-driven single-shot coding task (offline-LLM)

cli_commands.name: fleet
cli_commands.flags_summary: fleet <sub>  (alias: f)  worker control — up/status/down/doctor …

cli_commands.name: dispatch
cli_commands.flags_summary: dispatch <sub>  (alias: d)  route/scoreboard/simulate/cost-report …

cli_commands.name: orchestrate
cli_commands.flags_summary: orchestrate        Opus-driven conversational loop (interactive)

cli_commands.name: health
cli_commands.flags_summary: health  (alias: h)  current gap-registry health snapshot

cli_commands.name: session-summary
cli_commands.flags_summary: session-summary    merged + armed + filed PRs in current session window (INFRA-1437)

cli_commands.name: health-digest
cli_commands.flags_summary: health-digest      markdown digest with P0/P1 counts + warnings

cli_commands.name: fleet-status
cli_commands.flags_summary: fleet-status       per-worker throughput + lease state

cli_commands.name: fleet-velocity
cli_commands.flags_summary: fleet-velocity     PRs/day and ship-rate trend

cli_commands.name: waste-tally
cli_commands.flags_summary: waste-tally        % of compute spent on closed-without-merge PRs

cli_commands.name: ship-quality
cli_commands.flags_summary: ship-quality       post-merge signal: pass rate, revert rate

cli_commands.name: roadmap-status
cli_commands.flags_summary: roadmap-status     milestone completion %

cli_commands.name: mission-grade
cli_commands.flags_summary: mission-grade      current pillar grades (EFFECTIVE/CREDIBLE/RESILIENT/ZERO-WASTE)

cli_commands.name: lesson-grade
cli_commands.flags_summary: lesson-grade       lesson-learning quality score

cli_commands.name: ci-summary
cli_commands.flags_summary: ci-summary         last-N CI run outcomes

cli_commands.name: classify-failure
cli_commands.flags_summary: classify-failure   categorize a CI/PR failure for the improvement tracker

cli_commands.name: kpi
cli_commands.flags_summary: kpi report         KPI scorecard across all pillars

cli_commands.name: cost-watch
cli_commands.flags_summary: cost-watch  (alias: cs)  real-time inference spend + per-slot breakdown

cli_commands.name: cost
cli_commands.flags_summary: cost record-pr     attach cost metadata to a merged PR

cli_commands.name: pr-coupling-cost
cli_commands.flags_summary: pr-coupling-cost   cost of PRs that move together (coupling smell)

cli_commands.name: cascade
cli_commands.flags_summary: cascade stats      per-slot hit/miss/error counts for the provider cascade

cli_commands.name: funnel
cli_commands.flags_summary: funnel             install → first_task → return_d2 activation funnel

cli_commands.name: dashboard
cli_commands.flags_summary: dashboard          open the local web dashboard

cli_commands.name: session-track
cli_commands.flags_summary: session-track      start or continue a named work session

cli_commands.name: session-export
cli_commands.flags_summary: session-export     export session transcript as markdown

cli_commands.name: session-resume
cli_commands.flags_summary: session-resume     re-attach to the most recent session

cli_commands.name: reflect-delta
cli_commands.flags_summary: reflect-delta      compute lesson-delta since last reflection

cli_commands.name: rebase-stuck
cli_commands.flags_summary: rebase-stuck       auto-resolve stuck rebase for a given branch

cli_commands.name: pr
cli_commands.flags_summary: pr fix-clippy      run clippy --fix on the current PR branch

cli_commands.name: init
cli_commands.flags_summary: init               detect model, write .env, start server, open browser

event_kinds.name: pr_merged
event_kinds.emitter: scripts/coord/bot-merge.sh; GitHub webhook / PR close hook

event_kinds.name: orchestrate_session_summary
event_kinds.emitter: src/orchestrate.rs (chump orchestrate — emitted on each session exit, INFRA-1363)

event_kinds.name: orchestrate_session_summary
event_kinds.emitter: src/orchestrate.rs (chump orchestrate — emitted once at session end, INFRA-1363)

event_kinds.name: intent_parse_llm
event_kinds.emitter: src/main.rs (chump orchestrate <text> single-shot LLM fallback — INFRA-1452)

event_kinds.name: graphql_exhausted
event_kinds.emitter: scripts/coord/lib/github.sh (INFRA-1040, piggyback on every chump_gh call)

event_kinds.name: gate_check_start
event_kinds.emitter: scripts/ci/lib/gate-emit.sh (sourced by each CI gate — CREDIBLE-048)

event_kinds.name: gate_check_result
event_kinds.emitter: scripts/ci/lib/gate-emit.sh (sourced by each CI gate — CREDIBLE-048)

primitives.purpose_one_line: gap <sub>  (alias: g)  list, show, reserve, ship, audit-priorities …
primitives.when_to_use: Atomic gap registry mutations (list, show, reserve, ship, audit).

primitives.purpose_one_line: claim <GAP-ID>  (alias: c)  atomic worktree + lease + preflight in one call
primitives.when_to_use: Start work on an open gap — fetches main, runs preflight, creates worktree, takes a lease — all atomic.
Mark a gap as shipped after the PR merges; updates state.db and docs/gaps/*.yaml.
Operator control plane for the worker fleet (up/down/doctor/status).

primitives.purpose_one_line: health  (alias: h)  current gap-registry health snapshot
primitives.when_to_use: Snapshot of gap-registry pillar grades and SLO check.

primitives.purpose_one_line: session-summary    merged + armed + filed PRs in current session window (INFRA-1437)
health-digest      markdown digest with P0/P1 counts + warnings
waste-tally        % of compute spent on closed-without-merge PRs
ship-quality       post-merge signal: pass rate, revert rate
classify-failure   categorize a CI/PR failure for the improvement tracker
kpi report         KPI scorecard across all pillars
cost-watch  (alias: cs)  real-time inference spend + per-slot breakdown
cost record-pr     attach cost metadata to a merged PR
pr-coupling-cost   cost of PRs that move together (coupling smell)
cascade stats      per-slot hit/miss/error counts for the provider cascade
funnel             install → first_task → return_d2 activation funnel
dashboard          open the local web dashboard
session-track      start or continue a named work session
session-export     export session transcript as markdown
session-resume     re-attach to the most recent session
reflect-delta      compute lesson-delta since last reflection
rebase-stuck       auto-resolve stuck rebase for a given branch
pr fix-clippy      run clippy --fix on the current PR branch
init               detect model, write .env, start server, open browser
